meaning: 威廉斯堡[美国弗吉尼亚州东南部城市]
examples: The Tea Lounge is in Union Square in Williamsburg.
Most of them live in Williamsburg, so we'll go to a restaurant there for drinks and dinner.
And he and his family delayed a weekend visit to the historic town of Williamsburg, Virginia.
Williamsburg is famed (and scorned) for its hipster attire, worn by nearly everyone in the 'burg.
Drawn from the Casa Buonarroti and originating at the Muscarelle Museum of Art in Williamsburg, Va.
